About Me

I'm Hossain and I'm a

I’m a passionate problem solver and a creative developer with a strong foundation in algorithms, web development, Flutter Development and software engineering. From competitive programming to full-stack development, I love transforming ideas into reality through efficient algorithms and elegant designs.

Flutter Developer

Crafting cross-platform mobile apps with GetX, REST API, Firebase, maps, and offline storage (Hive/Shared Preferences).

Competitive Programmer

Optimizing algorithms and solving complex problems (Unlock Algorithm, Take Off, and online contests).

Web Developer

Building responsive, scalable web apps using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, and modern integrations.

Tech Enthusiast

Exploring networks (Cisco Packet Tracer), database systems, CI/CD pipelines, and emerging AI technologies.

Passionate about pushing boundaries, solving problems, and creating technology that makes a difference. Let’s build something remarkable together!

My Services

App Development

Building high-performance, cross-platform Android & iOS applications using Flutter, Dart, and REST APIs.

Web Development

Creating responsive websites using HTML, CSS, Tailwind, and JS, with backend integration using PHP and MySQL.

AI & Algorithms

Implementing Machine Learning models (Python) and solving complex logic problems using efficient Data Structures.

My Skills

Skills & Engineering Expertise

My engineering journey is built on a strong foundation of Problem Solving and Application Architecture. With background experience in competitive programming, I approach building systems with logical precision, focusing on performance, efficiency, and clean code principles.

I specialize in creating cross-platform mobile solutions with Flutter & Dart, alongside building scalable SaaS products and business systems with robust backend APIs. I focus on implementing automated development pipelines, structured database designs, and modern state management to deliver outstanding products.

Key Frameworks & Competencies
GetX State Manager Http (REST APIs) Flutter Map & Geolocator Shared Preferences Hive Database Voice Input & Commands Firebase Suite Git & CI/CD

Professional Experience

Present

Full-Time Flutter Developer

SM Technology

On-desk Professional Role

Worked full-time on-site developing high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. Focused on building robust features, integrating REST APIs, managing state with GetX, and ensuring clean, maintainable code architecture.

Flutter Dart GetX REST API

Development Practices

✓ Git & GitHub

Branch management, semantic commits, structured Pull Requests, and code review workflows to maintain high-quality codebases.

✓ CI/CD Pipelines

Automating tests, linting checkups, and builds using GitHub Actions for stable, continuous integration and deployment.

✓ Automated Testing

Writing reliable unit, integration, and widget tests to verify feature requirements and prevent regressions.

✓ Architecture & State

Applying Clean Architecture (MVVM/Layered) and robust state management (GetX, BLoC) for highly maintainable codebases.

✓ Performance & Caching

Profiling memory, lazy-loading assets, widget rebuild checks, and optimizing local databases (Hive) for smooth 60fps rendering.

✓ Release Management

Semantic versioning, production bundle signing, Play Store/App Store publishing, and feature-flag deployment configurations.

Certifications

Flutter App Development Course

Completed a comprehensive training program in Flutter app development, focusing on building high-performance, cross-platform mobile applications using Dart, Firebase, and modern state management architectures.
